name: Seltz Web Search MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server providing AI assistants with access to Seltz's web search capabilities. Enables AI agents to perform web searches for current information — supplementing AI knowledge with live web results for up-to-date answers.
use_cases: Providing real-time web search results to AI assistants for current information queries
Supplementing AI knowledge with live web data from research agents
Building search-augmented AI workflows using Seltz's search infrastructure
Enabling AI agents to retrieve current news, facts, and web content
not_for: Private or internal document search (public web focus)
High-volume batch search operations at scale
Structured data retrieval from specific sites
best_when: An AI assistant needs access to current web information beyond its training data — Seltz provides web search results that can be incorporated into AI responses.
avoid_when: You already have a more established search provider (Perplexity, Tavily, Brave Search). Seltz is a newer entrant and reliability is less established.

auth.notes: Seltz API credentials required. Remote MCP search endpoint.

pricing.notes: Emerging search service — pricing not publicly documented.

known_agent_gotchas: Very limited public information about Seltz — validate reliability before production deployment
Search queries pass through Seltz servers — privacy implications for sensitive searches
Search result quality not independently verified — compare with established search providers
Emerging service with no established track record
Rate limits and coverage not documented
agent_readiness.security_notes: Search queries processed by Seltz. Privacy considerations for sensitive search topics. API key required. Emerging service with unverified security practices.

security_score_components.security_notes: Search queries pass through Seltz. Privacy implications. Emerging service with unverified security posture. API key protection required.
